title: Shark-Tuff® 20M Universal Strimmer Wire Heavy Duty | 1.2mm 1.6mm 2mm Strimmer Cord | Grass Trimmer Strimmer Line | Fits All String Trimmer Models
features: ✅ Size : 1.6mm x 20 metres long Heavy duty Grass Strimmer Wire.
✅ UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY : Our trimmer line fits the widest range of cutting applications fixed-line, semi-automatic and automatic bump-feed heads.
✅ STURDY & LONG -LASTING : Made of finest nylon material which is capable of getting rid of heavy weed & grass.
✅ Round Heavy Duty Strimmer line in Blue color suitable for all electric and petrol grass strimmers.
description: Product description Heavy Duty Universal Garden Strimmer Wire 1.6mm | Electric Grass Trimmer Line Strimmer Cord 20m | Suitable for All String Trimmer Electric and Petrol Models Safety Warning Wear safety glasses, long pants and closed shoes to protect against flying debris and cuts. Maintain a safe distance from others during use and avoid contact with power lines.
